body.p: Connect to the cluster via the command-line interface.
In order to configure the network, edit the settings file.
Download the tarball and extract it to the installation directory.
See the above section for details on the installation prerequisites.
The table below lists all supported operating systems.
Deploy the frontend application to the web server.
The k8s cluster requires at least three control plane nodes.
This release includes a critical bugfix for the authentication module.
